(f) the realization made from sale of by-products viz. molasses, bagasse and press mud or their imputed value:¥

Explanation (4): Imputed value of the by-products would include unsold value or the notional or transfer value of such by-products for further value addition in the sugar factory like, alcohol and ethanol production from molasses, use of press mud for making bio-fertilizer and I or distillery effluent treatment, generation of power from bagasse or any other product produced through value addition to the by-products mentioned above but should not include the bagasse used for running the boiler of the main sugar factory for the production of sugar alone. ) / ,J.
